title: Trump calls Iran’s response to peace plan ‘totally unacceptable’ as ceasefire frays
summary_full: US president expresses ire at Tehran’s reported demands, as drones strike Gulf nations and Israel warns war ‘not over’Donald Trump has rejected an Iranian response to a US peace proposal as “totally unacceptable”, on a day the month-old ceasefire showed signs of fraying as drone strikes were reported around the region and Benjamin Netanyahu warned the war was “not over”.The Iranian counter-proposal was passed to Washington through Pakistani mediators. Continue reading...
